title: Lifeguards on duty during Easter period
description: GEORGE NEWS - From 21 March to 2 April...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - From 21 March to 2 April lifeguards will be on duty at ALL beaches that fall under George Municipal jurisdiction daily between 09:00 until 17:00.


> Conville Public Swimming Pool


Lifeguards are available at the Conville Public Swimming Pool from 21 March to 1 April, Monday to Sunday, including public holidays from 09:00 until 12:00 and again from 13:00 until 16:00 with 2 lifeguards on duty.


> Uniondale Public Swimming Pool


Lifeguards are available at the Uniondale Public Swimming Pool from 21 March to 1 April, Monday to Sunday, including Public Holidays from 09:00 until 12:00 and again from 13:00 until 16:00 with 2 lifeguards on duty.

As of 3 April until 1 December, there will be no lifeguards deployed at the beaches and swimming pools.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
